bugs.report_text: The text color is too dark and blends into the background, making content unreadable.
The content is misaligned and not centered on the screen, appearing bunched on the left side.
bugs.neg_code: <div className={`min-h-screen ${themeClasses.bg} flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 font-sans transition-colors duration-300`}>
bugs.pos_code: <div className={`min-h-screen ${themeClasses.bg} block p-8 font-sans transition-colors duration-300`}>

bugs.report_text: The header is hidden behind other interface elements and remains completely invisible.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="absolute top-8 left-8 right-8 flex items-center justify-between">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="absolute top-8 left-8 right-8 flex items-center justify-between z-[-1]">

bugs.report_text: The buttons are stacking vertically instead of being horizontally distributed, causing layout collapse.
The button is abnormally wide and extends far beyond its intended size, breaking the layout.
bugs.neg_code: className={`w-16 h-16 ${themeClasses.primary} rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition transform`}
bugs.pos_code: className={`w-166 h-16 ${themeClasses.primary} rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition transform`}

bugs.report_text: The sidebar is completely hidden behind other interface elements and cannot be accessed.
bugs.neg_code: <div className={`absolute right-8 top-32 w-64 ${themeClasses.card} rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-xl border max-h-96 overflow-y-auto hidden lg:block`}>
bugs.pos_code: <div className={`absolute right-8 top-32 w-64 ${themeClasses.card} rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-xl border max-h-96 overflow-y-auto hidden lg:block z-[-10]`}>

bugs.report_text: The buttons are bunched together on one side instead of being spread across the available space.
The song information is overlapping with other elements below due to incorrect spacing.
The song title text is rendered at an abnormally large size and breaks the container layout.
The progress slider is barely visible with no visual distinction, making it difficult to interact with.
